title: Model forward with cache giving incorrect logits
issue_summary: The sparse-attention transformer produced different logits when run incrementally with cache versus recomputing the same prefix from scratch.

root_cause.summary: The public issue establishes a cache-path inconsistency; the local benchmark models that inconsistency as an omitted current-token contribution in the incremental sparse context.
root_cause.basis: issue report plus conservative local modeling inference

symptom: Last-step logits from cached decoding diverge from full forward logits for the same token prefix.

local_reproduction.mapping: The local case uses a toy sparse causal attention window and makes the buggy incremental path omit the current token from the context, reproducing the cached-vs-full logit divergence reported in the issue.

issue_contract.trigger: Run incremental sparse decoding with a cache and compare it against full-sequence decoding.
issue_contract.mechanism: The buggy cache path omits the current token from the sparse attention context.
issue_contract.observable_symptom: Last-step cached logits differ from full forward logits.

reproduction_scope.mechanism_level_claim: This case reproduces a cache-path inconsistency in incremental sparse decoding.
reproduction_scope.issue_level_observable_claim: This case reproduces the reported symptom that cached logits differ from full forward logits.
